text:
Once upon a time there was a tiny blue bird named Chuck. Chuck lived in an old oak tree near a quiet forest pond. Birds seemed interested in Chuck. They liked his song. They even liked his nest place. One day a great kite bird flew over Chuck's head.

The kite bird wanted a fresh new leaf nest. She flew right into Chuck's. They flew off together.

Just then a loud branch snapped! Down came an owl!

"Hmph," said Owl.

"I just love leaves!" thought Chuck.

They escaped safely anyway.

Soon they flew some more. That time a big hawk swooped!

"Oh dear," thought Chuck.

But they flew away. Birds seemed to enjoy their adventures.

One sunny day they flew together to an island. Maybe they'll have their own nest!

Suddenly an eagle stole the bird egg. A bad guy!

Just swooshed in Chuck!

"Tonto!" thought the eagle.

"Not again!" thought Chuck.

They scared off the hawk eagles.

Chuck
